title: Forever Server 2
description: This mod pack adds significant QOL and graphical improvements without taking away the core minecraft experience we all know and love.
body:
**My private server modpack that will be updated to every future version of minecraft on the same world.**

This pack is almost entirely vanilla+ features, QOL changes, and optimizations. There are zero content mods. It's main purpose is to simplify some of minecrafts more time consuming features in order to give the player more time for the things they want to do. It also adds huge graphical improvements without a significant framerate hit due to its many optimization mods.

Credits:
- 
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
